RuleSet.description: Represents a group of rules with the same context

SharedRuleSet.description: Represents a set of rules that are identical except for context

Digest.description:
A Per-Product digested product availability rule set
Tracks rules that match the product (ruleIds)
Tracks available globally (whitelisted or no rules at global level = true, blacklisted at global level = false)
Tracks customer ids with white or blacklist matches for this product
Tracks site ids with white or blacklist matches for this product
Tracks subscription product ids that contain this product

sales.description: Total sales counts to facilitate OpenSearch result sorting

Sales.description: Total sales counts to facilitate OpenSearch result sorting

digest.description:

sales.description: Total sales counts to facilitate OpenSearch result sorting

term.description: General search term. This will be used to find relevant products according to an internal algorithm.

query.description:
Find products of a particular productType that loosely match a passed in object.

Queries may only be conducted against one productType at a time. To search against multiple productTypes,
consider instead using `match`.

match.description: Find products that strictly match the passed in partial object(s).

total.description: If set to true, return a total count of all matched products.

term.description: General search term. This will be used to find relevant products according to an internal algorithm.

query.description:
Find products of a particular productType that loosely match a passed in object.

Queries may only be conducted against one productType at a time. To search against multiple productTypes,
consider instead using `match`.

match.description: Find products that strictly match the passed in partial object(s).

total.description: If set to true, return a total count of all matched products.

inmateJwt.description: If an inmate jwt was provided and valid, its payload will be held here.

corpJwt.description: If a corp jwt was provided and valid, its payload will be held here.

tabletJwt.description: If a tablet jwt was provided and valid, its value will be held here.

apiKey.description: If an api key was provided and valid, its value will be held here.

facilityJwt:beta.description: If a facility jwt (beta) was provided and valid, its value will be held here.

facilityJwt.description: If a facility jwt (v1) was provided and valid, its value will be held here.

customerId.description:
The current customerId. If the user has access to multiple customerIds, they must access
each customer with separate JWTs.

siteIds.description: The sites which are allowed for the user for the current customer.

disablePurchaseType.description: Controls what productTypes are NOT allowed to be utilized (purchase/rental/subscription)

purchase.description: Controls what productTypes are NOT allowed for purchase

rental.description: Controls what productTypes are NOT allowed for rental

subscription.description: Controls what productTypes are NOT allowed for subscription

telemetry.description: Do orders for this productType have telemetry logs

displayName.description: Display friendly name for productType (e.g. "TV Episode")

restrictedAccess.description: if restrictedAccess equals to true edit action requires VP approval
